overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian assassin robes walking through a sunlit temple complex and waterfront promenade. The character moves past NPCs in period attire, decorative stonework, and palm trees toward a riverside canopy with views of the Nile.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple entrance promenade with ceremonial gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple entrance past decorative pots and palm trees along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: priest in green robes holding a staff walking toward the camera
group of civilians in linen garments walking along the promenade

entered.detail: large stone entrance archway with hanging white banners
large black and gold patterned ceramic planter with palm tree
tall palm tree in decorative planter
distant mountain range visible beyond the temple complex
tall sandstone wall with hieroglyphic carvings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand temple entrance marked by a large stone archway and decorative ceramic pots. Palm trees line the paved promenade as NPCs in ancient Egyptian attire walk about. The scene is brightly lit by afternoon sun with mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: passing by a large golden statue monument on the right side of the path
crowd density increases near the monument area with more NPCs visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the plaza past the golden monument and various NPCs in traditional dress

notable_agents.action: woman carrying a woven basket on her head walking past the camera
guard standing watch near the golden monument base

entered.detail: large golden statue with outstretched wings on a stone pedestal
massive stone bowl planter with decorative carvings
wooden frame structure with hanging white fabric curtains ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open ceremonial plaza featuring a prominent golden monument with outstretched wings. The area is populated with NPCs including a woman carrying goods on her head. Large stone planters and palm trees decorate the space as the character approaches a fabric canopy structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront canopy walkway with hanging fabric curtains

events.description: entering the shaded canopy structure with white fabric curtains
reaching the waterfront railing with view of the river and distant city

agents.ego_description: walking under the fabric canopy toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: wooden pillars with golden bands supporting the canopy roof
white linen curtains hanging from the canopy frame
tall black metal brazier stand with fire bowl
wide river with brown water visible beyond the railing
ancient Egyptian sailing vessel with large sail on the water
distant city buildings and temples across the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered walkway with a fabric canopy supported by wooden posts. White curtains hang from the structure as the character approaches the waterfront. The view opens to reveal the Nile river with sailing vessels and a distant city skyline under the afternoon sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand temple complex that gradually opens up to a panoramic view of the Nile riverfront. It begins by following the character through a stone archway lined with decorative ceramic pots and palm trees, moving past NPCs under the bright afternoon sun with distant mountains on the horizon. As the character advances, the scene expands into an open ceremonial plaza centered around a golden winged monument and populated by locals carrying goods. The camera then shifts from the open plaza into a semi-covered walkway, passing under a fabric canopy with hanging white curtains. Finally, the path leads directly to the waterfront, where the view opens to reveal sailing vessels on the river and a distant city skyline.
